name: Tara & Frazier
body: Nothing was too much trouble and she saved us both so much time to concentrate on just enjoying ourselves.

name: Rhiannon & Jack
body: Our planner remained calm and focused throughout and ensured that every single one of our guests had a great time.

name: Donna & Christian
body: All our guests enjoyed it. We didn't want our day to end. You were the perfect host and handled everything professionally.

name: Nicola & Andrew
body: You guys took one conversation and turned it into a whole wedding. I am so glad I didn't have to find out.

name: Anna & Chris
body: You worked so hard and managed to overcome all the problems, with no fuss. We all had a fantastic day.

name: Nicky & Lewis
body: She was actively involved but never over-bearing, found us some fantastic suppliers, provided solutions to all problems.

name: Lin & Leo
body: Our planner was present throughout the whole day, dealt with any issues in her usual calm but assertive manner.

name: Alison & Grant
body: It was exactly how I had envisaged it to be — they totally took on board everything I said.
